arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah bidding to equal Daniel Sturridge Liverpool record in Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah could equal a Reds record set by Daniel Sturridge when Arne Slot's side take on Everton in Saturday's Premier League Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: 'I have no sympathy' - Liverpool sent blunt contract verdict with Mohamed Salah message
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news and gossip with Alan Shearer giving his opinion on the futures of Mohamed Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: I was in contact with Arne Slot about signing for Liverpool – he told me it was impossible
arts.sum: Feyenoord defender David Hancko has opened up about a conversation he had with Arne Slot in the summer regarding a possible transfer to Liverpool and reunion with his former boss

arts.ttl: Every word of Arne Slot’s press conference ahead of the Merseyside derby at Goodison
arts.sum: We know we have to be ready for a tough game against a good side, against a well-managed side as well and so probably the fans will be loud – I would say maybe just as loud as the Newcastle ones, probably these ones are going to be louder. Going into this derby, you’ve got a lot of experienced players who know what it’s all about.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have had smooth sailing under Arne Slot - but now they face more than one storm
arts.sum: The Reds are seven clear at the top but face another clutch of tricky fixtures with the Merseyside derby next in line

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes Jurgen Klopp exit feelings clear after Arne Slot's smooth start
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has said the decision to part ways with Jurgen Klopp earlier this year has proven a good decision for all parties thanks to Arne Slot's excellent transition

arts.ttl: Arne Slot warns Liverpool must learn from last season’s defeat at Everton
arts.sum: League leaders make final league visit to Goodison Park ‘You must be aggressive, but aggressive in a smart way’ Arne Slot has said Liverpool must be smarter in the 245th Merseyside derby having played into Everton’s hands on their last visit to Goodison Park. Slot prepared for his first derby as Liverpool head coach by analysing last season’s 2-0 defeat at Goodison, which in effect extinguished Jürgen Klopp’s hopes of winning the Premier League title. The Dutchman was struck by the amount of free-kicks Liverpool conceded that night and insisted there should be no repeat against a Sean Dyche team that are dangerous at set pieces. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool issue joint Merseyside derby statement as Storm Darragh set to arrive
arts.sum: Everton are working with key partner agencies to monitor the weather, with severe winds expected to hit Merseyside on Saturday, ahead of the derby with Liverpool

arts.ttl: Ornstein gives Arsenal and Liverpool BOMBSHELL Zubimendi update
arts.sum: Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi is 'increasingly expected' to be on the move next summer, according to David Ornstein. At the time, there was an 'expectation' that Liverpool would succeed in convincing the 25-year-old to finally leave his boyhood club, but the unpredictable midfielder decided against the move and stayed put for another season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot reveals timeline for Alisson, Diogo Jota and Federico Chiesa returns amid triple boost
arts.sum: The trio are on course to return this month
